title: Threat Modeling Security Fundamentals
summary: This learning path takes you through the four main phases of threat modeling, explains the differences between each data-flow diagram element, walks you through the threat modeling framework, recommends different tools and gives you a step-by-step guide on creating proper data-flow diagrams.

sections.title: Threat Modeling Security Fundamentals
sections.summary: This learning path takes you through the four main phases of threat modeling, explains the differences between each data-flow diagram element, walks you through the threat modeling framework, recommends different tools and gives you a step-by-step guide on creating proper data-flow diagrams.

lessons.title: Introduction to threat modeling
lessons.content_md:
Explore the four high-level steps of threat modeling. This engineering technique identifies potential threats early in the development lifecycle.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-introduction-to-threat-modeling/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Create a threat model using data-flow diagram elements
lessons.content_md:
Data-flow diagrams are graphical representations of your system and should specify each element, their interactions, and context.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-create-a-threat-model-using-foundational-data-flow-diagram-elements/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a threat model using data-flow diagram elements

lessons.title: Provide context with the right depth layer
lessons.content_md:
Threat models can get complex if all parties involved can't agree on a data-flow diagram depth layer that provides enough context to satisfy requirements

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-provide-context-with-the-right-depth-layer/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Provide context with the right depth layer

lessons.title: Approach your data-flow diagram with the right threat model focus
lessons.content_md:
Threat modeling is an effective technique to help you identify threats and ways to reduce or eliminate risk. We start by deciding to focus on either what needs to be protected or who it needs protection from.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-approach-your-data-flow-diagram-with-the-right-threat-model-focus/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Approach your data-flow diagram with the right threat model focus

lessons.title: Use a framework to identify threats and find ways to reduce or eliminate risk
lessons.content_md:
Threat modeling helps you generate a list of potential threats using STRIDE and find ways to reduce or eliminate risk with corresponding security controls.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-use-a-framework-to-identify-threats-and-find-ways-to-reduce-or-eliminate-risk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use a framework to identify threats and find ways to reduce or eliminate risk

lessons.title: Prioritize your issues and apply security controls
lessons.content_md:
Threat modeling provides you with a list of threats and ways to reduce or eliminate risk, but it doesn't prioritize them for you. Also, there are no layered security control recommendations based on their type and function.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-prioritize-your-issues-and-apply-security-controls/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Prioritize your issues and apply security controls

lessons.title: Use recommended tools to create a data-flow diagram
lessons.content_md:
You can use any canvas, physical or virtual, to create a data-flow diagram. Engineers at Microsoft recommend three tools to help you in your threat modeling journey.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tm-use-recommended-tools-to-create-a-data-flow-diagram/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use recommended tools to create a data-flow diagram

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Threat Modeling Security Fundamentals
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Threat Modeling Security Fundamentals**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
